message.content:
@startuml
skinparam ClassDiagram labelStyle "C"
skinparam Interface labelStyle "I"

class Encounter {
    +enemies : [Monster]
    +dungeon : Dungeon
    +announceEnemies()
    +moveEnemies()
}

class MediumDungeon {
    +newBokoblin() : Bokoblin
    +newMoblin() : Moblin
}

class EasyDungeon {
    +newBokoblin() : Bokoblin
    +newMoblin() : Moblin
}

class BlueBokoblin {
    +announce()
    +move()
    +bludgeon()
    +defend()
}

class BlueMoblin {
    +announce()
    +move()
    +stab()
    +kick()
}

class NormalBokoblin {
    +announce()
    +move()
    +bludgeon()
    +defend()
}

class NormalMoblin {
    +announce()
    +move()
    +stab()
    +kick()
}

class Bokoblin {
    +bludgeon()
    +defend()
}

class Moblin {
    +stab()
    +kick()
}

class Dungeon {
    +newBokoblin() : Bokoblin
    +newMoblin() : Moblin
}

class Monster {
    +announce()
    +move()
}

Encounter <|-- Encounter
Encounter <|-- Encounter

MediumDungeon <|-- BlueBokoblin
MediumDungeon <|-- BlueMoblin
MediumDungeon <|-- NormalBokoblin
MediumDungeon <|-- NormalMoblin

EasyDungeon <|-- BlueBokoblin
EasyDungeon <|-- BlueMoblin
EasyDungeon <|-- NormalBokoblin
EasyDungeon <|-- NormalMoblin

Dungeon <|-- Bokoblin
Dungeon <|-- Moblin
